anchor: 4. Add a one-sentence self-check that confirms the answer matches the objective.
text: 5. For README verification tasks, check that the file has a Title, Install, and Usage section in that order.

_rejection.reason: Over-specified: hardcodes one task type (README verification) into a general task-decomposition skill. Violates 'generalize, don't hardcode'. Surfaced by val-001 only; no support across the minibatch.
